title: Special adviser data releases: numbers and costs, July 2025
body: "This publication lists the names of the special advisers in post as at 31 July 2025, including:   each special adviser’s pay band salaries in bands of £5,000 where this is £76,000 or higher details of the special advisers’ pay ranges the total pay bill cost of special advisers for the period 1 April 2024 - 31 March 2025  "
